forbidden_material_statement: No completed references, target drawings, target thumbnails, target hashes, expected answers, score reports, generator outputs, archived conversations, raw completed-reference content, or unlisted source-root files were opened. Reads were limited to the task brief, visible-file manifest, listed evidence files, and directory metadata checks required for bundle-existence criteria.
input_mutation_statement: No input evidence files or bundle evidence were intentionally modified. Only the two output report paths authorized by the task brief were written.
